title: [Honeyed Gears, Entry]
description: Steam coils lazily from unseen vents as bursts of metallic clinks and candy-sweet fizzles echo through the cluttered space.  Diagrams flap along the walls, barely holding fast under tacks bent from overuse.  A disorganized pile of metallic cylinders dominates the corner, surrounded by half-finished contraptions and sugar-encrusted tools strewn across every surface.
